title: Middle Eastern Roasted Dumplings
description: A flavorful and aromatic dish featuring roasted vegetables and pan-fried dumplings, inspired by the rich flavors of Middle Eastern cuisine.

ingredients.name: Dumpling wrappers (gluten-free)
ingredients.notes: available at most Asian grocery stores

instructions: Roast the eggplant, zucchini, and red bell pepper for 20-30 minutes or until tender.
In a large pan, heat 2 tbsp of oil over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the roasted vegetables, cumin, coriander, salt, and pepper. Stir to combine.
In a separate pan, heat 1 tbsp of oil over medium heat.
Pan-fry the dumpling wrappers until golden brown.
Serve the pan-fried dumplings with the roasted vegetable mixture.
